summary: Ukrainian forces reported recent gains near Novoselivka in Dnipropetrovsk region and continued clearing operations around Vovkove, Sychneve, and other villages. Russian air activity includes multiple cruise missile launches toward Konotop, Bila Tserkva, and Cherkasy districts, as well as drone incursions into Romanian airspace over Galaţi. Both sides cite heightened missile and UAV activity across multiple fronts.
key_points: Ukrainian troops liberated territory near Novoselivka in Dnipropetrovsk region, with the enemy losing at least 46 km² of land (Source: @UkraineNow/81535).
Multiple cruise missiles were reported over Konotop, Bila Tserkva, and Cherkasy districts, with no confirmed impacts in Kyiv (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262, @mon1tor_ua/67275).
A Russian drone struck a multi‑storey building in Galaţi, Romania, causing a fire, two injuries and evacuation of 70 residents (Source: @UkraineNow/81524).
Ukrainian air defence observed up to 20 Shahed drones from Poltava and Sumy heading toward Cherkasy region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
Ukrainian special forces reportedly disabled a key Russian FSB radio‑electronic intelligence site in the Krasnodar region (Source: @UkraineNow/81537).
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs over Zaporizhzhia and Donetsk regions (Source: @kpszsu/63264, @kpszsu/63263).
Ukrainian forces reported a group of UAVs moving north in Kharkiv region toward Staryi Mertchyk (Source: @kpszsu/63256).
Russian President Putin claimed Russian forces are advancing on all fronts daily (Source: @UkraineNow/81541).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian forces have reclaimed territory near Novoselivka in Dnipropetrovsk region, while Russian missile and UAV activity intensifies across central and northern Ukraine, including cruise missile launches toward Konotop and Bila Tserkva. A Russian drone breach into Romanian airspace over Galaţi caused civilian casualties and prompted diplomatic responses. Both sides report increased use of guided bombs and Shahed drones, indicating a heightened operational tempo.

points: Ukrainian troops liberated areas near Novoselivka in Dnipropetrovsk region and conducted clearing operations around Vovkove, Sychneve, Piddubne, Tovste, Novokhatke, and Zelenyi Hai, with the enemy losing at least 46 km² of territory (Source: @UkraineNow/81535).

Ukrainian special forces used drones to strike a Russian FSB radio‑electronic intelligence node in the Krasnodar region, disabling key command and control assets used for missile and UAV guidance (Source: @UkraineNow/81537).
Ukrainian air defence reported Shahed drone activity from Poltava and Sumy heading toward Cherkasy's Zolotonosha district, indicating continued low‑altitude threats (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
Ukrainian units observed UAV groups moving north in Kharkiv region toward the settlement of Staryi Mertchyk, suggesting reconnaissance or strike missions (Source: @kpszsu/63256).

Ukrainian forces reported a group of cruise missiles forming near Vinnytsia and heading toward Kyiv, and another group near Kagarlyk, indicating potential massed missile attacks (Source: @eRadarrua/94213).

Russian forces launched cruise missiles toward Konotop in the northeast and toward Bila Tserkva and Cherkasy districts, though Kyiv reported only ballistic overflights without impacts (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262, @mon1tor_ua/67275).
Russian tactical aviation deployed guided aviation bombs over Zaporizhzhia and Donetsk regions, targeting Ukrainian positions (Source: @kpszsu/63264, @kpszsu/63263).
Multiple Shahed drones were tracked heading from Poltava and Sumy toward Cherkasy, reflecting continued Russian UAV deployment (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
Russian President Putin claimed Russian troops are advancing on all fronts each day, framing the conflict as nearing its conclusion (Source: @UkraineNow/81541).
A Russian drone entered Romanian airspace over Galaţi, striking a residential building and prompting diplomatic protests (Source: @UkraineNow/81524).
UAV activity was reported on the eastern edge of Kharkiv region moving toward Balaklia, indicating possible reconnaissance or strike intent (Source: @kpszsu/63268).
Guided aviation bomb launches were noted over Donetsk region, suggesting intensified Russian air strikes in the east (Source: @kpszsu/63263).
Ukrainian forces reported a UAV on the east of Dnipropetrovsk region heading past Ternevka from the east (Source: @kpszsu/63262).
Russian missile launches were observed toward the Konotop area, a strategic location in the northeast (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262).
Ukrainian reports indicated a group of UAVs moving north in Kharkiv region toward Staryi Mertchyk (Source: @kpszsu/63256).
Ukrainian radar detected Shahed drones from Poltava and Sumy heading toward Cherkasy's Zolotonosha district, reflecting northern threat vectors (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
UAVs were observed on the north of Kharkiv region moving toward the settlement of Staryi Mertchyk (Source: @kpszsu/63256).
A Russian missile launch was reported toward Bila Tserkva, a city north of Kyiv (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67271).
Ukrainian forces noted a Shahed drone over Bila Tserkva (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67266).
Ukrainian air defence reported a missile launch from Poltava toward Cherkasy, indicating cross‑regional strike capability (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67268).
Ukrainian forces reported a UAV on the south of Dnipropetrovsk region heading toward Kryvyi Rih (Source: @kpszsu/63257).
Guided aviation bombs were launched over Zaporizhzhia region, targeting southern Ukrainian positions (Source: @kpszsu/63264).
Ukrainian reports indicated missile activity toward Kremenchuk from Cherkasy and Vinnytsia regions (Source: @kpszsu/63247, @kpszsu/63238).
Ukrainian air defence observed Shahed drones from Poltava and Sumy heading toward Cherkasy, affecting the southern central axis (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
Ukrainian forces reported a missile launch from Cherkasy toward Vinnytsia (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67268).
Russian tactical aviation employed guided aviation bombs over Zaporizhzhia and Donetsk, indicating intensified air strike campaigns (Source: @kpszsu/63264, @kpszsu/63263).
Multiple cruise missile launches were tracked toward Konotop, Bila Tserkva, and Cherkasy districts, though Kyiv reported only ballistic overflights (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262, @mon1tor_ua/67275).
Shahed UAVs were observed from Poltava and Sumy heading toward Cherkasy, reflecting continued low‑altitude drone threats (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
A Russian drone breached Romanian airspace over Galaţi, striking a residential building and causing civilian casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81524).
Ukrainian forces reported UAV groups moving north in Kharkiv region toward Staryi Mertchyk, suggesting reconnaissance activity (Source: @kpszsu/63256).

key_developments: Ukrainian troops liberated territory near Novoselivka in Dnipropetrovsk region, with the enemy losing at least 46 km² of land (Source: @UkraineNow/81535).

Russian cruise missiles were launched toward Konotop, Bila Tserkva, and Cherkasy districts, though Kyiv reported only ballistic overflights without confirmed impacts (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67262, @mon1tor_ua/67275).
A Russian drone struck a multi‑storey building in Galaţi, Romania, causing a fire, two injuries and the evacuation of 70 residents (Source: @UkraineNow/81524).
Ukrainian special forces used drones to disable a Russian FSB radio‑electronic intelligence site in the Krasnodar region (Source: @UkraineNow/81537).
Russian tactical aviation deployed guided aviation bombs over Zaporizhzhia and Donetsk regions (Source: @kpszsu/63264, @kpszsu/63263).
Shahed drones from Poltava and Sumy were tracked heading toward Cherkasy's Zolotonosha district (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67261).
Ukrainian forces reported a group of cruise missiles forming near Vinnytsia and heading toward Kyiv, indicating potential massed missile attacks (Source: @eRadarrua/94213).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian missile and UAV activity remains widespread, targeting central Ukrainian cities and extending into neighboring Romania, indicating a strategy to pressure both Ukraine and its allies. Ukrainian counter‑operations, including UAV strikes on Russian intelligence sites and territorial gains in Dnipropetrovsk, demonstrate resilience but face escalating aerial threats. Continued use of guided bombs and cruise missiles suggests Russia is seeking to degrade Ukrainian air defences and command structures across multiple fronts.
sections.regional_response: Romania has condemned the drone strike over Galaţi and is seeking diplomatic measures, while Ukraine has offered assistance to bolster Romanian air defence capabilities. NATO members have expressed concern over the cross‑border incident, highlighting the potential for broader regional escalation. Ukrainian diplomatic channels are emphasizing the need for coordinated air‑defence support among neighboring states.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Shahed drone launch points in Poltava and Sumy should be intensified to anticipate future incursions toward central Ukraine. The pattern of cruise missile launches toward Konotop and Bila Tserkva suggests preparation for larger scale strikes, warranting heightened radar and missile defence readiness. UAV activity in Kharkiv and Donetsk regions indicates ongoing reconnaissance that could precede targeted air or ground operations.
